message:
feat(doom-overlay): add progress callbacks, WASM debug tracing, and init timeout protection

Enhance the DOOM overlay extension with better observability and
resilience during initialization:

doom-engine.ts:
- Accept optional progress callback in constructor for real-time status
  reporting during the multi-step init process
- Instrument WebAssembly.compile() and WebAssembly.instantiate() with
  debug tracing: each call gets a sequential ID, start/done/fail events
  with timing in milliseconds, collected in wasmDebug array
- Add 15-second timeout guard around createDoomModule() that includes
  the wasmDebug trace in the timeout error message for diagnostics
- Properly restore original WebAssembly.compile/instantiate in finally
  block to avoid polluting global state
- Add progress notifications at each init phase: WASM location, WAD
  loading, JS glue evaluation, module instantiation, engine boot,
  framebuffer ready

index.ts:
- Wire up progress callback from DoomEngine constructor to
  ctx.ui.notify() for user-visible initialization status
- Add notification checkpoints for engine creation, init, and overlay
  opening

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
